Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: We have two types of constraints 1 For keys existence absence exactlyone init The value is a dictionary where the keys are the activities and the value is another dictionary with support and confidence 2 For keys respondedexistence coexistence response precedence succession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession The value is a dictionary where the keys are pairs of activities as tuples or strings and the value is a dictionary with support and confidence

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note the problem statement says for the second set of keys the value is a dictionary containing as keys the activities But in the example of a DECLARE model for binary constraints the key is typically a pair of activities Looking at the official pm4py documentation for DECLARE models The DECLARE model is a dictionary where each key is a constraint template and the value is a dictionary of the form activity1 activity2 support confidence for binary constraints For unary constraints the key is just the activity So indeed for unary constraints the key is the activity string and for binary constraints the key is a tuple of two activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the above I will assume For unary constraints existence absence exactlyone init The value is a dictionary where each key is an activity string and the value is a dictionary with support and confidence For binary constraints the rest The value is a dictionary where each key is a tuple of two activities activity1 activity2 and the value is a dictionary with support and confidence

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets think about the process We start with Idea Generation IG Then we do Design Draft DD after IG We have Technical Feasibility Check TFC and Cost Evaluation CE which might be done after DD and before Prototype Creation PC After PC we must do LT and UT these two can be in any order but both must occur after PC and before AG After LT and UT we must do AG After AG we must do MP After MP we must do FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets try to set up some constraints 1 Init The process starts with IG 2 Existence Every product idea must have at least one occurrence of IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL exactlyone for each activity response IG DD AG MP MP FL precedence DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG

Name: Validation - PE
Text: chainresponse IG DD IG must be immediately followed by DD we cannot set chainprecedence for DD TFC because there might be CE in between So we dont set chainprecedence for that Similarly we can set chainresponse for MP FL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We can also set some noncoexistence constraints but in our process every case has both IG and FL so we dont want noncoexistence for that Alternatively we can set some nonsuccession constraints FL cannot be followed by any other activity nonsuccession FL IG FL DD for all activities But note the model might become very large

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Given the above lets construct the model Well use init exactlyone response precedence chainresponse nonsuccession We are not given the exact constraints so we are free to choose Lets write the model dictionary Well set init IG exactlyone for each activity response IG DD AG MP MP FL precedence DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG chainresponse IG DD MP FL
